title: Dr. Beckmann Service-it Deep Clean Dishwasher Cleaner | Hygienically cleans and removes bad odours | Incl. wet wipe | 75 g (Pack of 1)
features: Powerful hygienic clean removes 99.9% of all bacteria and micro-organisms
Actively eliminates grease, residues and umpleasant odours from your dishwasher & prevents breakdowns. Targets hard-to-reach areas including the the filter.
Optimal 2-step system: Powder for use inside the machine and specially designed wet wipe fto clean and maintain seals and grooves
Leaves your machine smelling fresh. Chlorine free.
Always read the label and product information before use.
description: Product Description During every wash cycle dirt, grease and residues can settle in hidden or hard-to-reach areas like water-jets, tubes and pipes. Over time, these deposits can lead to malfunction. Humidity inside the dishwasher can lead to the development of bad odours and bacteria. Dr. Beckmann Dishwasher Hygiene Cleaner protects your appliance. Thanks to the 2-stages system your machine gets thoroughly clean: 1. Joints and sealings are cleaned with the special wipe. 2. The powder deeply cleans the dishwasher, particularly the difficult-to-reach parts and reliably eliminates odours, germs and bacteria Thus, cleaning performance is preserved. Because only a hygienically cleaned machine guarantees truly clean dishes and cutlery. Tip: To protect and maintain your dishwasher use regularly (depending on number of cycles, every 1-2 months). DIRECTIONS FOR USE 1. Using the wipe, clean the rubber seals and frame of the dishwasher. 2. In the empty machine: Fill the dosing compartment to the maximum level with the powder. Spread the rest of the powder on the floor base of the dishwasher. Do not add dishwasher detergent! 3. Run a wash cycle (at least 60 ºC). The dishwasher is ready for use immediately after the cleaning procedure. Important Information Store in a cool and dry place. Always follow manufacturer's manual. Ingredients / Directions Clean the rubber seals and the frame of the dishwasher. Fill the dosage compartment up to maximum powder. Distribute the rest of the powder to the bottom of the dishwasher. Do not add dishwasher detergent. Wash at least 60°C. Box Contains 1 Manufacturer Contact Information ACDOCO Ltd., Customer Services, Freepost BL1 0O9, Tel.: +44 (0) 845 0178 000 See more
